lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require major repairs.
Good condition.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and some minor dents. The interior shows signs of use and aging. It is currently operational but may require maintenance or minor repairs.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, dents, or chips, and the interior is pristine, appearing as though it has never been sat in. Every mechanical component functions perfectly, and it has been meticulously maintained with a full service history. This car is a rare find for a collector or discerning buyer looking for a factory-fresh experience.

Step into excellence with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. From the flawless exterior to the immaculate interior, this car looks and drives just like it did the day it first hit the road. This is a rare find for any buyer looking for a vehicle in truly exceptional, like-new shape!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should, making it a reliable choice for daily driving. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors; the seats are in great shape with only minor wear on the driver-side bolster. All power features, including the windows, locks, and air conditioning, are fully functional. This is a solid, honest car that is ready for the road.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that validates its pristine status. Every facet of this vehicle reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the absolute precision of a new delivery. This represents an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands a superlative driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person to believe it. I have absolutely babied this car from day one, and it is in total showroom condition—not a single scratch or dent to be found! It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh, new-car feel. I’m really looking for a great new home for it, so come take a look and fall in love!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been meticulously ceramic coated, the exterior is entirely devoid of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the factory wheels are free of even the slightest curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show no signs of creasing, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships, and I have maintained a comprehensive binder of every service record to document its pampered life. It has spent every night in a climate-controlled garage and has never been driven in inclement weather. From the crisp response of the engine to the seamless shifts of the transmission, this vehicle offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a collector-grade example for the most discerning enthusiast who settles for nothing less than perfection.

Presenting a masterfully preserved example of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to an exacting standard that transcends typical pre-owned expectations. Every surface reflects a commitment to aesthetic perfection, while the mechanical integrity remains beyond reproach. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of showroom quality, this acquisition offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior—has been preserved with meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative condition, offering both mechanical excellence and aesthetic perfection for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Hey everyone! 🚗 Check out this absolute beauty! I've taken such good care of her that she's basically in showroom condition—seriously, it's like she just rolled off the lot. If you're looking for a ride that’s totally flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example of the legendary S54-powered coupe. The naturally aspirated 3.2L straight-six remains the pinnacle of high-revving precision, featuring independent throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that delivers linear torque across the entire powerband. The chassis is impeccably maintained with documented subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under lateral load. Power is managed through a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock. This vehicle exhibits zero mechanical lash and maintains factory tolerances in both the suspension geometry and drivetrain. A true turn-key specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Showroom condition. No scratches or dents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Low mileage.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that remains in showroom-fresh condition. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, ensuring the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, crystal-clear displays, and that distinct new-car aroma. Every mechanical component performs with precision, backed by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. From the flawless alloy wheels to the untouched undercarriage, every detail reflects a life of pampering and pride of ownership. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Meticulously inspected and mechanically pristine, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

It drives like an absolute dream and has been kept impeccably clean. If you're looking for something that looks and feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! This is a collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection and uncompromising

Hey there! I'm honestly so excited to show you this car—it’s an absolute dream! It’s been pampered since day one and is in truly spectacular, mint condition. It looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom. You won't find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offered is a superlative 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S, a definitive example of the 996.2 wide-body silhouette. This specimen features the M96.03 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power through a tactile G96 6-speed manual transaxle and a viscous-coupling all-wheel-drive system. The mechanical integrity is absolute; the IMS bearing has been proactively addressed with a dual-row ceramic upgrade, and the bore-scope inspection confirms zero scoring. The chassis retains factory-spec kinematics with refreshed control arms and Bilstein dampers, ensuring a communicative steering rack. The braking system utilizes four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors with negligible wear. Cosmetically, the Basalt Black Metallic finish shows consistent micron depth across all panels, while the interior remains free of UV degradation or bolster compression. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Immaculate interior and exterior. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade example, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like factory finish completely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been meticulously garage-kept and hand-washed only. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still retains its original new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is flawless, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history from a single enthusiast owner. Every electronic feature, from the infotainment to the driver-assist systems, functions exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. This is a turn-key, investment-quality vehicle for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically superior and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a machine in absolute peak condition. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.
